title: not sure how to express this but i feel that devin is evolving into something like a composable unit of intelligence each devin is a flexible building block that can do pretty much anything and you can spin them up on demand modular, reusable, not tied to your laptop

content.summary: not sure how to express this but i feel that devin is evolving into something like a composable unit of intelligence each devin is a flexible building block that can do pretty much anything and you can spin them up on demand modular, reusable, not tied to your laptop Cognition (@cognition) Devin can now manage a team of Devins. Devin will break down large tasks and delegate them to parallel Devins that each run in their own VM. Over time, Devin gets better at breaking down and managing tasks for your codebase. Available now for all users. Video — https://nitter.net/cognition/status/2034679897084264659#m

Post title: not sure how to express this but i feel that devin is evolving into something like a composable unit of intelligence each devin is a flexible building block that can do pretty much anything and you can spin them up on demand modular, reusable, not tied to your laptop
